jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Sahyadri Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sahyadri Hospitals. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
